page.title: Deadpool
page.intro: A Deadpool hub celebrating fourth-wall chaos, brutal action-comedy, and the franchise's irreverent heart.

films.title: Deadpool
films.hook: A meta superhero film that reset expectations for comic adaptations.

films.title: Deadpool 2
films.hook: Bigger cast, sharper banter, and surprisingly emotional beats.

films.title: Deadpool and Wolverine
films.hook: A chaotic team-up with legacy nods and relentless energy.

cast.name: Ryan Reynolds
cast.reason: Pitch-perfect blend of sarcasm, vulnerability, and violence.

cast.name: Hugh Jackman
cast.reason: Brings raw gravitas that clashes brilliantly with Wade's chaos.

cast.name: Morena Baccarin
cast.reason: Adds emotional stakes and chemistry that anchor the humor.

cast.name: Josh Brolin
cast.reason: A hard-edged contrast that strengthens Deadpool 2's dynamic.

pillars.title: Fourth-Wall Precision
pillars.description: Meta commentary is used as structure, not just punchline.

pillars.title: Comedy + Carnage
pillars.description: Action choreography and humor are tightly interwoven.

pillars.title: Chosen Family
pillars.description: Underneath the jokes, the films revolve around belonging and loyalty.

pillars.title: Franchise Self-Awareness
pillars.description: Deadpool turns genre tropes into the core storytelling engine.

quotes.line: Life is an endless series of trainwrecks with only brief, commercial-like breaks of happiness.
You're probably thinking, whose balls did I have to fondle to get my very own movie?

scenes.name: Opening Highway Sequence
scenes.impact: Set the franchise tone instantly with stylized chaos and meta narration.

scenes.name: X-Force Drop
scenes.impact: A brutal comedy set piece that became instantly iconic.

scenes.name: Prison Break at Ice Box
scenes.impact: Blends absurdity and intensity while escalating emotional stakes.

scenes.name: Wade + Logan Car Chemistry
scenes.impact: The verbal sparring dynamic powers the latest film's momentum.
